name: human-skills
description: Nine creative-production skills from Human — image direction, cinematic product shots & video campaigns, vertical product ads, brand Creative DNA, editorial Instagram carousels, IG/LinkedIn unfolding, multi-agent OpenSquad campaigns (/team), and Remotion motion graphics. Three render paths: Magnific MCP direct (plan credits), Magnific Hybrid Run Unlimited (zero credits), or Higgsfield (paid). Bilingual EN/PT.
